preservedBehaviors.description: useCustomersFilters fetches /api/territories and /api/team/members with appropriate query keys
Members query enabled only when canViewTeam is truthy
useTerritoryLabel returns 'All territories' when no territoryId selected
useAssigneeLabel returns 'My customers' when canViewTeam is false, 'All assignees' otherwise
useCustomersList uses useInfiniteQuery with dedupeById and default limit 50
useCustomersSearch debounces input with setTimeout/clearTimeout
Store created with zustand, initial state includes all filter fields with null defaults
setTerritoryId coerces to integer via Math.trunc, rejects non-finite as null
setDateField accepts only 'created', defaults to 'activity'
setDateRange converts Date objects to ISO strings
Territory mapping includes subtitle from territory_type field
Member mapping uses 'Member' fallback label and includes role subtitle
useCustomersFilters has gcTime for cache garbage collection
useCustomersSearch re-syncs when initialValue changes (dependency array includes initialValue)
useCustomersSearch trims debouncedSearch via useMemo and provides stable setter via useCallback
clearFilters preserves current search value (keepSearch pattern)
Store initial status is empty string, datePreset is 'this_month'
setStatus normalizes input via .trim().toLowerCase()
useCustomersList validates territoryId as finite integer (safeTerritoryId)
Members query filters by m.active to only show active members
useCustomersList normalizes dateField to 'created' or 'activity', clamps limit 1-100
useCustomersList supports json.customers as fallback array key
useCustomersList has retry function that skips 401 errors and attaches status to thrown errors
useCustomersList uses toQueryString helper that skips null/empty params
